inputs.label: Video Width
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal resolution of the video in pixels

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal resolution of the video in pixels

inputs.label: Video Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical resolution of the video in pixels

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical resolution of the video in pixels

inputs.label: Frame Rate
inputs.businessContext: Number of frames displayed per second

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of frames displayed per second

inputs.label: Color Depth
inputs.businessContext: Number of bits used to represent the color of a single pixel, e.g., 24 for True Color

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of bits used to represent the color of a single pixel, e.g., 24 for True Color
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir pikselin rengini temsil etmek için kullanılan bit sayısı, örn. 24 (Gerçek Renk)

inputs.label: Compression Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Typical values: 0.1 for H.264, 0.05 for H.265. Determines the compression factor applied to the uncompressed bitrate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical values: 0.1 for H.264, 0.05 for H.265. Determines the compression factor applied to the uncompressed bitrate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tipik değerler: H.264 için 0.1, H.265 için 0.05. Sıkıştırılmamış bit hızına uygulanan sıkıştırma faktörünü belirler.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: Length of the video in seconds, used to calculate total file size

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the video in seconds, used to calculate total file size
businessContext_i18n.tr: Videonun saniye cinsinden uzunluğu, toplam dosya boyutunu hesaplamak için kullanılır

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
